mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, alert_type, title, content, priority, status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_dashboard_alerts (supplier_id, alert_type, title, content, priority, status, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{alertType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_dashboard_alerts (supplier_id, alert_type, title, content, priority, status, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.alertType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.priority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_dashboard_alerts WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_dashboard_alerts WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_dashboard_alerts SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_dashboard_alerts SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
